articles.title: How AI Signal-Based Selling Is Replacing Traditional Outbound in 2026
articles.description: New research from Forrester shows that companies using AI-driven intent signals are seeing 3.2x higher reply rates compared to traditional cold outreach methods. The shift toward signal-based GTM is accelerating.

articles.title: The RevOps Stack of 2026: From Chaos to Composable Architecture
articles.description: Revenue operations teams are moving from monolithic CRM setups to composable RevOps stacks. This deep-dive covers the emerging architecture patterns including CDP-first approaches and real-time pipeline orchestration.

articles.title: NRR Benchmarks 2026: Why 120% Is the New Floor for Growth-Stage SaaS
articles.description: Kyle Poyar's latest analysis of 2,400 SaaS companies reveals that net revenue retention above 120% is now table stakes for Series B+ companies. Companies below this threshold face 40% higher churn in investor confidence.

articles.title: GTM Engineering: The New Role That's Replacing Growth Hacking
articles.description: GTM Engineers combine product, data, and go-to-market skills to build automated acquisition systems. Companies like Ramp, Clay, and Notion are hiring for this hybrid role at $180-250K base.

articles.title: Product-Led Growth Meets Enterprise: The Hybrid PLG Playbook
articles.description: Atlassian, Figma, and Canva share their playbooks for converting free users into enterprise contracts. The key: usage signals trigger sales-assist motions at exactly the right moment.

articles.title: AI-Powered Churn Prediction: From Lagging to Leading Indicators
articles.description: New ML models from Gainsight and Totango can predict churn 90 days out with 87% accuracy by combining product usage, support ticket sentiment, and billing patterns into unified health scores.

articles.title: Cold Email Is Dead? Data Says Otherwise — But Only With AI Personalization
articles.description: Smartlead's analysis of 14M cold emails shows that AI-personalized sequences maintain 4.8% reply rates while template-based outreach dropped to 0.3%. The gap has never been wider.

articles.title: The Death of MQLs: How Revenue Teams Are Adopting Buying Group Signals
articles.description: 6sense and Demandbase report that companies abandoning MQL-based handoffs in favor of buying group intent signals see 2.1x faster pipeline velocity and 35% higher win rates.

articles.title: Dynamic Pricing in SaaS: Lessons from Snowflake's Usage-Based Model
articles.description: Consumption-based pricing now accounts for 45% of cloud revenue. This analysis breaks down how Snowflake, Twilio, and Datadog structure their pricing to maximize expansion revenue while minimizing churn.

articles.title: Customer Success in the Age of AI: Automating the 80% to Focus on the 20%
articles.description: Leading CS teams are using AI to automate health monitoring, QBR prep, and renewal forecasting — freeing CSMs to focus on strategic accounts. Results: 40% productivity gain with no increase in churn.

articles.title: ABM 3.0: How AI Is Making Account-Based Marketing Finally Work at Scale
articles.description: The third wave of ABM combines AI account scoring, real-time intent data, and automated multi-channel orchestration. Early adopters report 58% higher ACV with 30% shorter sales cycles.

articles.title: MEDDIC Gets an AI Upgrade: Automated Deal Qualification Is Here
articles.description: Gong and Clari now offer AI-powered MEDDIC scoring that analyzes call transcripts, email threads, and CRM data to auto-qualify deals with 91% accuracy compared to manual rep assessments.

articles.title: Voice of Customer at Scale: How NPS Is Being Replaced by Real-Time Sentiment
articles.description: Qualtrics and Medallia are shifting from periodic NPS surveys to continuous sentiment analysis across support tickets, product usage, and social mentions. The result: 3x faster response to at-risk accounts.

articles.title: The GTM Engineer's Toolkit: 15 Tools Every Revenue Team Needs in 2026
articles.description: From Clay for enrichment to Unify for signal orchestration to Common Room for community-led growth — this is the definitive stack guide for modern GTM engineering teams.

articles.title: Cross-Sell Revenue: The $2.7T Opportunity Most SaaS Companies Are Missing
articles.description: McKinsey's latest B2B report shows that SaaS companies with structured cross-sell programs grow 1.8x faster than those without. The key: product usage data predicts cross-sell readiness with 73% accuracy.

articles.title: Renewal Ops Maturity Model: From Reactive to Predictive in 6 Months
articles.description: A step-by-step framework for transforming renewal operations from fire-fighting mode to a predictive, data-driven machine. Includes benchmark data from 500+ SaaS companies.

articles.title: Demand Gen in a Post-Cookie World: First-Party Intent Signals Win
articles.description: With third-party cookies fully deprecated, B2B marketers are building first-party intent signal infrastructure. Companies investing in owned data see 2.5x better attribution accuracy.

articles.title: Revenue Architecture: Building the Operating System for Your GTM Motion
articles.description: Winning by Design's latest framework treats revenue as a system, not a series of handoffs. The Revenue Architecture model connects marketing, sales, and CS into a single unified data layer.

articles.title: The Rise of the AI SDR: Autonomous Prospecting Agents Hit $1B Market
articles.description: AI SDR platforms like 11x, AiSDR, and Artisan have collectively raised $800M in 2025-2026. Early data shows AI SDRs book 2.3x more meetings per month than human reps — but quality concerns remain.

articles.title: PLG Metrics That Matter: Activation Rate Is the New North Star
articles.description: Amplitude's analysis of 1,200 PLG companies shows activation rate (not signups) is the #1 predictor of long-term revenue. Companies with >40% Day-7 activation grow 3.5x faster.

articles.title: Churn Autopsy: Analyzing 10,000 Cancellations to Find the 3 Real Reasons
articles.description: A data-driven analysis of cancellation reasons across mid-market SaaS reveals that 78% of churn stems from just 3 root causes: poor onboarding, missing integrations, and champion departure.

articles.title: LinkedIn Outbound in 2026: Why DMs Beat InMail 4:1 on Response Rate
articles.description: New data from Sales Navigator shows organic LinkedIn DMs from personal profiles get 4.1x higher response rates than sponsored InMail. The playbook includes connection warming, content engagement, and contextual messaging.

articles.title: Deal Desk Automation: How Salesforce Reduced Quote-to-Close by 60%
articles.description: Salesforce's internal RevOps team shares how they automated deal desk approvals, discount governance, and contract generation — cutting their average quote-to-close time from 14 days to 5.5 days.

articles.title: GRR vs NRR: Why Gross Retention Is the Metric Boards Actually Care About
articles.description: Investors are increasingly looking at GRR (gross revenue retention) as the true health indicator. High NRR can mask underlying churn if expansion is doing all the heavy lifting.
